calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Trustee Kenneth Stewart And Appoint Successor Trustee And Appoint Temporary Trust
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Remove Trustee Kenneth Stewart And Appoint Successor Trustee And Appoint Temporary Trust
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cecilia Fusich appeared by zoom for Micheal Stewart (petitioner).
Brian Connors appeared by zoom for and with Kenneth Stewart by zoom.

Mrs. Fusich apologized to Mr. Connors and to the court stating that it was her intent and Mr. Vernon's intent to retire next week, that they brought in an attorney to take over all their matters, that they just learned that the attorney will not be coming in, that it has been chaos and that she feels mediation is still in the best interest of this case. Mr. Connors stated that many of the issues have been narrowed down, that he believes there are only two issues left that seem to be at an impasse, and that he presented a proposal, but it seems that Mrs. Fusich's client has rejected it. Mr. Connors also stated that he is pretty set on the terms, but he is willing to do whatever it takes to get this matter resolved as he does not feel that this is a matter to be tried. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 2, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 11, 2024. The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. and status of mediation are continued to and the Parties are to return on December 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status. The parties are to obtain a copy of the mediation order from the court's website.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee Kenneth Stewart And Appoint Successor Trustee And Appoint Temporary Trust
Off Calendar Jun-03-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Vernon and Cecilia Fusich appeared by zoom for Michael Stewart.
Brian Connors appeared by zoom for Kenneth Stewart (trustee).

Discussion was held regarding the missing exhibits still not having been filed, the circumstances and family dynamics between the two brothers, the parties proceeding with written discovery in both directions, some unresolved issues that will require a second amended petition, the parties still waiting for answers to discovery requests, but being willing to discuss mediation, Mr. Vernon's client wanting to sue Mr. Connor's client as an individual not as a trustee on issues that took place before the mother's death, said issues not being appropriate under Probate Code 17200 and being civil matters, etc. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 23, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by August 26, 2024. The Petition to Remove Trustee and Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on August 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The parties are to obtain a copy of the mediation order from the court's website. The court also offers the ability of having informal discovery.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee Kenneth Stewart And Appoint Successor Trustee And Appoint Temporary Trust
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Continued To Jun-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Cecilia Fusich appeared via zoom for Michael Stewart (petitioner).
Brian Conners appeared via zoom for and with Ken Stewart (objector).

Discussion was held regarding the sale of real property, that only $100,000.00 has been distributed, and that all parties are open to mediation. Amended petition etc., is continued to June 03, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Trustee Kenneth Stewart And Appoint Successor Trustee And Appoint Temporary Trust
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Mar-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee Kenneth Stewart And Appoint Successor Trustee And Appoint Temporary Trust
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen Vernon appeared via zoom for Michael Stewart (petitioner).
Brian Conners appeared via zoom for and with Ken Stewart (objector).

Discussion was held regarding the elder abuse claims, that a suggestion for a filing to add additional claims, and that a briefing schedule should be in effect. Amended filing due on December 29th 2023, Opposition filed by January 22, 2024 and Hearing set for February 14, 2024. Petition to remove trustee Kenneth Stewart and appoint successor trustee etc., is continued to February 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.
